title: Fast Fiction Factory Extraction Validator Hardening
purpose: Local-first validator hardening for the Extraction Contract. This slice preserves the Visual Review Hub, Claim Ledger, Timeline View, Profile/Ghost Flow, local persistence, JSON import/export, freeform review intake, and human-owned canon boundaries while adding standalone extraction payload validation, seven fixture payloads, built-in guard checks, and fixture smoke evidence before any adapter, model/API behavior, database persistence, publishing adapter, AI video generation, or final canon decision exists.
validation_command: & { $files = @('public/review/index.html', 'tools/fff-state.mjs', 'artifacts/artifact-manifest.json', 'artifacts/ARTIFACTS.md', 'artifacts/sample-project-state.json', 'artifacts/current-project-state.json', 'artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json', 'artifacts/extraction-contract-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/extraction-validator-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/freeform-review-intake-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/profile-ghost-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/fff-current-review-screenshot.png', 'artifacts/fff-review-contact-sheet.png', 'docs/review/current-status.md', 'docs/review/next-terminal-handoff.md', 'docs/review/extraction-validator-hardening-review.md', 'docs/review/extraction-contract-review.md', 'docs/review/freeform-review-intake.md', 'docs/data-model.md', 'docs/project-context.md', 'docs/idea-ledger.md', 'docs/decision-log.md', 'scripts/operator/open_review.ps1'); $fixtures = @('valid-minimal.json', 'missing-source-refs.json', 'overconfident-human-owned-decision.json', 'invalid-routing-visual-asset-to-claim.json', 'auto-canon-leak.json', 'missing-review-safe-defaults.json', 'unknown-fields-preservation.json') | ForEach-Object { Join-Path 'artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures' $_ }; $allFiles = $files + $fixtures; $missing = $allFiles | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path $_) }; if ($missing) { throw ('Missing files: ' + ($missing -join ', ')) }; $manifest = Get-Content artifacts/artifact-manifest.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($manifest.artifact_id -ne 'fff-extraction-validator-hardening-001') { throw 'Manifest artifact id mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_artifact_id -ne 'fff-extraction-contract-001') { throw 'Preserved artifact id mismatch' }; if ($manifest.review_input_mode -ne 'freeform') { throw 'Review input mode mismatch' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/current-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/sample-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures/valid-minimal.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures/unknown-fields-preservation.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs smoke-extraction-fixtures artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures artifacts/extraction-validator-smoke-result.json; $smoke = Get-Content artifacts/extraction-validator-smoke-result.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $smoke.passed) { throw 'Extraction validator smoke failed' }; if ($smoke.summary.fixtureCount -ne 7 -or $smoke.summary.expectedValid -ne 2 -or $smoke.summary.expectedInvalid -ne 5 -or $smoke.summary.mismatched -ne 0) { throw 'Extraction validator smoke matrix mismatch' }; $html = Get-Content public/review/index.html -Raw; @('fff-extraction-validator-hardening-001', 'fff-extraction-contract-001', 'Extraction Contract', 'Validator hardening', 'Claim Ledger', 'Timeline View', 'Profile/Ghost Flow', 'Toma fate', 'brass moth truth', 'Council motive') | ForEach-Object { if ($html -notmatch [regex]::Escape($_)) { throw ('Missing required Review Hub text: ' + $_) } }; @('artifacts/fff-current-review-screenshot.png', 'artifacts/fff-review-contact-sheet.png') | ForEach-Object { $item = Get-Item $_; if ($item.Length -le 0) { throw ('Empty visual artifact: ' + $_) } }; Write-Output 'Extraction validator hardening validation passed' }
validation_result: passed 2026-06-19T13:57:22+09:00; current/sample project-state validation passed, sample extraction payload validation passed, expected-valid fixture validation passed with unknown-field preservation warnings, seven-fixture smoke matrix passed with 2 expected-valid fixtures, 5 expected-invalid fixtures, 0 mismatches, and 5 built-in guards, manifest validation command passed, git diff whitespace check passed, MkDocs strict build passed with non-fatal Material upstream notice, and Chrome screenshot/contact sheet artifacts were regenerated from localhost with the active validator hardening artifact visible
review_prompt_hint: Review the validator hardening in natural language. Useful feedback can mention missing fixture classes, overly strict checks, unsafe routing that should fail, unknown-field preservation behavior, or any case that should remain review debt before adapter work.
next_action: Use the fixture matrix as the gate for a local-only extraction adapter spike. Keep adapter output source-tracked, review-held by default, and blocked from auto-canon promotion before adding any model/API dependency, database persistence, publishing adapter, AI video generation, production sync, or final canon decision.
